Live supply chain intelligence

One seamless platform turning payouts into loyalty.

Smart Epsilon’s platform tracks every unit from plant to shelf, verifies authenticity at every scan, and connects supply chain visibility, channel engagement, and AI video intelligence in one place.

Schedule a demo Explore Solutions

Our philosophy

20+ years in supply chain have taught us one thing: visibility and trust are not add-ons. They are the foundation. Smart Epsilon turns every tracking code into a live digital identity that gives leadership, field teams, and consumers the information they need.

01

Counterfeits quietly drain your margin, damage customer trust, and bleed revenue.

Smart Epsilon's Platform gives every unit a cloud-based identity. Customers verify authenticity with a quick scan, and cloned codes are flagged the moment they appear.

The Solutions

One Platform. Zero Blind Spots.

Every angle of your supply chain, covered by one connected system and strengthened with every module we ship.

Solution 01

Track & Trace

Complete product traceability from manufacturing to consumer.

Unit-level serialization
Real-time supply chain tracking
ERP & logistics integration
Solution 02

Anti-Counterfeit

Overt, covert, and forensic protection — verified in seconds.

Three-layer security markers
Geo-tagged clone detection
AI watermark authentication
Solution 03

Payment-linked Incentives

Reward genuine purchases and build long-term distributor and retailer relationships.

Earn points through product scans
Redemption marketplace
Channel loyalty programs
Solution 04

AI Video Intelligence

Transform warehouse and logistics operations using AI-powered video analytics.

Loading/unloading verification
Theft & anomaly detection
Process compliance monitoring

Inside the Platform

One unified dashboard for total control.

Monitor batch status, scan volume metrics, and visual alert feeds in real time.

Every package shipment maps to a unique digital ledger, letting warehouse operators aggregate primary packaging to pallets automatically.

Live Mapping Aggregation GS1 EPCIS 2.0 Logistics

Detect fake duplicates in real-time. Geo-tagged scan reports verify brand authenticity and alert compliance teams instantly.

Clone Alerts Overt Labels Watermarks Anti-Fraud

Wired directly into warehouse cameras to scan product codes, audit pallet counts, and verify shipping compliance.

CCTV Feed Box Auditing Compliance Alert Logs

Business Impact

Three things every unit earns you the moment it's serialized.

Measure productivity gains, counterfeit mitigation rates, and supply chain health indicators.

Visibility

One live source of truth from plant to shelf. Track every unit at every node and make decisions using real channel data, not distributor estimates.

80% Improvement in inventory visibility

Authenticity

Three-layer anti-counterfeit protection helps anyone verify a product in seconds and flags cloned codes as soon as they appear in the channel.

99.2% Verified authentic

Agility

Real-time alerts for diversion, stockouts, and counterfeits help your teams respond within hours instead of discovering the damage months later.

20–25% Stockout reduction

Trust factors

Trusted by industry leaders

Customer voices

Real results from the teams using Smart Epsilon.

See what supply chain and brand protection leaders
experienced after implementing the platform.

“

Within a quarter, we could see exactly what’s moving through our channel in real time. Smart Epsilon resolved our stockout concerns almost completely.

“

Within two quarters, Smart Epsilon’s anti-counterfeiting solution significantly reduced counterfeit-related complaints. Our field team can now identify cloned products before they reach customers.

Smart Epsilon integrated with our existing SAP setup without replacing any systems. We went live within weeks, and field adoption was faster than expected.
